actions.action: 为“choose a role ai story”准备事实受控的英文页面
actions.why: 与语C产品高度匹配，多来源需求信号较强，公开结果竞争代理较低；综合机会分 80。
actions.expectedImpact: 把免费公开研究中最可信的机会转成可审核页面任务。

actions.action: 人工核对证据链接与搜索意图
actions.why: 免费模式使用代理指标，不提供供应商月搜索量或 KD。
actions.expectedImpact: 避免把代理分误读为精确市场规模。

actions.action: 确认剧情、角色、语音能力与原创素材后再发布
actions.why: 研究信号不能替代第一手产品证据。
actions.expectedImpact: 降低低价值内容和虚假产品承诺风险。

brief.title: Choose A Role Ai Story | Play an AI Voice Story
brief.description: Explore choose a role ai story through a story-led voice roleplay experience with selectable characters.
sections: 可选择角色和各自目标
语音互动如何推动剧情
真实试玩证据与原创素材
相关剧情与下一步入口
evidenceRequired: 至少 1 个真实可玩的公开剧情
产品团队确认的全部可选角色或角色视角
产品团队确认的语音能力
原创视觉、语音或试玩素材
qualityGate: 一个明确搜索意图和一个 H1
代理指标明确标注且保留证据链接
不使用未经授权的第三方 IP
通过移动端、链接和索引检查

draft.title: Choose a Role in an AI Story | Story-Led Voice Roleplay
draft.metaDescription: Choose an available character and step into an existing story plot through an AI voice roleplay experience built for in-character play.
draft.h1: Choose a Role in an AI Story
draft.heroMarkdown: A story is already waiting. Choose one of its available characters, step into that role, and use your voice to play from inside the plot. This is AI voice roleplay shaped around a story—not an empty chat box asking you to invent everything before the experience can begin.

sections.heading: Start with a story, not a blank screen
sections.bodyMarkdown: Every playable experience begins with an existing story plot. The setting, situation, and available roles give you a clear dramatic starting point, so your first decision is about who you want to become inside the story. That story-first structure makes the experience easier to enter: you can focus on the character's point of view and respond to what is happening instead of spending the opening moments building a world from nothing.

sections.heading: Choose the character you want to perform
sections.bodyMarkdown: A role changes how a scene feels. You choose from the story characters that are available in the experience, then approach the plot through that character's place in it. The same opening situation can carry different tension, curiosity, or responsibility depending on the role you select. The page should show the actual available roles for the featured story before publication, so visitors know what they can choose without relying on invented examples.

sections.heading: Play the scene through voice roleplay
sections.bodyMarkdown: The experience is built around AI voice cosplay and roleplay. Once you enter the story as your selected character, voice becomes the way you perform inside the scene. What matters here is not a promise about a particular voice technology; it is the creative format: acting from within a prepared plot, responding in character, and treating the story as a place to perform rather than a prompt to read passively.

sections.heading: Built by a team with interactive-fiction roots
sections.bodyMarkdown: The team behind the product has previously built AI interactive-fiction and simulator experiences. That background informs a story-led approach in which context, character choice, and participation belong together. For this page, the strongest proof will come from an original, playable story and accurate images of its real role-selection flow. Those assets should be added only after the product team confirms the exact story and roles to feature.

sections.heading: What to expect before you begin
sections.bodyMarkdown: First, open a featured story and understand its opening situation. Next, review the characters that are available and choose the role you want to perform. Then enter the story as that character and continue through the voice roleplay experience. The final published page should link directly to a confirmed playable story. Until that destination and its assets are approved, this draft remains ready for human review rather than ready for automatic publication.

faqs.question: What does it mean to choose a role in an AI story?
faqs.answerMarkdown: It means selecting one of the characters available in an existing story plot and entering the experience from that character's point of view. The role gives you a defined place inside the scene before the voice roleplay begins.

faqs.question: Do I have to write the whole story first?
faqs.answerMarkdown: No. Each playable experience starts from an existing story plot rather than an empty chat box. You begin by understanding the situation and choosing an available character to perform.

faqs.question: Is this a voice roleplay experience?
faqs.answerMarkdown: Yes. The product is being built as an AI voice cosplay and roleplay experience centered on acting inside a story. This draft intentionally makes no unverified claim about specific voice technology or performance.

faqs.question: Can I use a famous character or fictional universe?
faqs.answerMarkdown: This page is designed around original story material. It should not use unlicensed entertainment characters, worlds, trademarks, or other recognizable third-party intellectual property.

assetBriefs: Capture an original desktop-and-mobile view of a confirmed story opening; do not show third-party entertainment IP.
Create a role-selection visual using only characters that the product team confirms are actually available in the featured story.
Record a short product demo only after the exact voice flow and destination story have passed product review.

checks.label: 只使用已批准产品事实
checks.detail: 草稿引用的四项事实均来自产品团队 brief。

checks.label: 不使用第三方 IP
checks.detail: 正文只描述原创故事与角色。

checks.label: 无虚构能力或数据
checks.detail: 未声称多人、实时、免费、平台、定价或技术指标。

checks.label: 发布前人工审核
checks.detail: 真实剧情、角色、素材与目标链接仍需产品团队确认。

checks.label: 页面内容达到最低深度
checks.detail: 可发布正文与 FAQ 共 632 个英文词。

evidence.title: Plotto — multiplayer co-op stories with voice, image and text
Reverie — multi-character group calls with distinct voices
Roleloom — original characters, scenes, identity and continuing roleplay
Chatopia — choose a story, play as a character and change the outcome
Wimo — interactive worlds, characters, scenes and voice
Castmates — voiced characters with backstories and story memory
Community discussion asking for roleplay with multiple live characters

caveats: 免费研究模式不提供月搜索量、CPC 或 Semrush KD；需求分和竞争分均为 0–100 代理指标。
代理分依据公开搜索结果的重复出现、近期性、用户讨论和头部结果强度计算，结果会随网页变化。
所有发布建议都必须经过人工产品事实与版权审核。
